response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned Staff/Senior Software Engineer with over 15 years of professional experience spanning embedded systems, high-throughput microservices, GIS platforms, and AI-agent infrastructure. While his TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS skills are technically aligned with the stack, he is severely overqualified for a junior/mid-level individual contributor role. His current and prior titles (Staff Engineer, Senior Developer at scale companies) and career trajectory make it implausible that he would be satisfied with entry-level scope, responsibility, or compensation. Additionally, his database background skews heavily toward MongoDB rather than the preferred PostgreSQL, and Nest.js does not appear in his history.
strengths: Deep, production-proven TypeScript and Node.js expertise, including React and AWS CDK at Optilyz
Strong engineering discipline: explicit TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, and CI/CD practice throughout career
AI/LLM integration experience at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflows, covering the nicest of nice-to-haves
concerns: Severely overqualified — 15+ years of Staff/Senior-level experience is mismatched with a junior/mid entry-level scope and likely compensation band
Primary database experience is MongoDB and MySQL; no PostgreSQL explicitly mentioned despite it being the preferred relational database
No Nest.js experience listed, which is one of the two core framework preferences for the role
